mapper.select: SELECT d.*, e.name as director_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN engineers e ON d.director_id = e.id ORDER BY d.display_order, d.id

SELECT d.*, dir.name as director_name, g.id as g_id, g.department_id as g_department_id, g.code as g_code, g.name as g_name, g.description as g_description, g.leader_id as g_leader_id, g.display_order as g_display_order, g.is_active as g_is_active, g.created_at as g_created_at, g.updated_at as g_updated_at, e.name as g_leader_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN engineers dir ON d.director_id = dir.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON d.id = g.department_id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id ORDER BY d.display_order, d.id, g.display_order, g.id
SELECT d.*, e.name as director_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN engineers e ON d.director_id = e.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.*, dir.name as director_name, g.id as g_id, g.department_id as g_department_id, g.code as g_code, g.name as g_name, g.description as g_description, g.leader_id as g_leader_id, g.display_order as g_display_order, g.is_active as g_is_active, g.created_at as g_created_at, g.updated_at as g_updated_at, e.name as g_leader_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN engineers dir ON d.director_id = dir.id LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON d.id = g.department_id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id WHERE d.id = #{id} ORDER BY g.display_order, g.id
SELECT d.*, e.name as director_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN engineers e ON d.director_id = e.id WHERE d.code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (code, name, description, display_order, is_active, director_id) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive}, #{directorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, director_id = #{directorId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM departments WHERE id = #{id}
